hero.title: AI-Powered Fraud Intelligence for Payments and Documents
hero.subtitle: Detect fraud in payrolls, invoices and payment documents with real-time artificial intelligence.

preview.title: See PaySentinelIQ in Action
preview.subtitle: A glimpse of the powerful intelligence dashboard

features.title: Everything you need to protect financial operations
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade AI tools for complete fraud prevention

fraud.title: AI Fraud Detection
fraud.desc: Real-time fraud detection powered by multi-agent AI analysis across payroll and payment documents.

payroll.title: Payroll Intelligence
payroll.desc: Automated payroll verification with salary anomaly detection and ghost employee identification.

invoice.title: Invoice Verification
invoice.desc: Smart invoice validation with barcode analysis, duplicate detection, and PIX fraud screening.

insights.title: Actionable Insights
insights.desc: AI-generated intelligence briefs with recommended actions and risk mitigation strategies.

compliance.title: Compliance Ready
compliance.desc: Built-in SOC 2 compliance tracking with automated audit trail generation and reporting.

audit.title: Immutable Audit Trail
audit.desc: Complete chronological log of all AI decisions and analyst actions for regulatory compliance.

how.title: How PaySentinelIQ Works
how.subtitle: Four simple steps to intelligent fraud prevention

step1.title: Upload Document
step1.desc: Upload payrolls, invoices or bank slips for AI analysis.

step2.title: AI Processes Information
step2.desc: Our AI engine analyzes patterns, cross-references data and detects anomalies.

step3.title: Fraud Intelligence Generated
step3.desc: Receive detailed risk scores, flagged items and confidence ratings.

step4.title: Receive Decision & Insights
step4.desc: Get actionable intelligence reports and compliance documentation.

cta.title: Protect your financial ecosystem with AI
cta.subtitle: Join enterprises already using PaySentinelIQ for intelligent fraud prevention.
